title: Multiple choice input component with controlled and uncontrolled state
purpose: Provides a dropdown selection component that supports both controlled and uncontrolled usage patterns with proper accessibility attributes.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named MultipleChoice that accepts various props for configuration and rendering a select dropdown with options.

steps.content: Generate a unique ID for the component instance.
Create IDs for the label and description elements.
Initialize internal state for the selected value if not controlled externally.
Determine the current value to use, either from controlled prop or internal state.
Define the change handler that updates internal state and notifies parent of changes.
Render the label element if a label is provided.
Render the select dropdown with options and apply all configured attributes.
